case_title: PEARL WILLIAMS VS. DONTAE DOE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PEARL HEARING SET FOR OCT-01-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PEARL AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, DONTAE DOE, DOMION DOE, LUCINDA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PEARL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-01-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF PEARL WILLIAMS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, PEARL
